description: Square graphic from ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' arrest-card series. The background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up of two open hands in metal handcuffs, with a dark gradient on the left. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/14/2025 | San Diego, CA'. A red diagonal corner banner at top-right reads 'SAN DIEGO' in white serif caps. A large white sans-serif name at mid-left reads 'Mirna Elisabeth Villatra-Rivas'. Below is a white 'CRIMES' label and a bullet: 'Drug trafficking'. Bottom-left has the round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom-right a red box with '-THE- WORST FIRST'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/14/2025 | San Diego, CA; Mirna Elisabeth Villatra-Rivas; CRIMES: Drug trafficking; SAN DIEGO; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
